title: City on the River
overview: A Latvian tragicomedy about a young artist who bears witness to the dramatic political upheavals of the WWII era. As brutal regimes come and go, his country, his village, his people, and even his heart are swept up in the inexorable currents of history.

trailers.title: THE SIGN PAINTER Trailer | PÖFF 2020
trailers.channel_name: PÖFF | Tallinn Black Nights Film Festival
